closure.carryForward: The reminder that a beginning can be quiet.
closure.release: The pressure to make the first page perfect.
closure.finalNote: A first sentence is enough tonight.

tomorrowPlan.intention: Rested and spending quality time with my closest two friends !
tomorrowPlan.note: Just soak up some sun if youre lucky and get some haha ! Just relax and allow yourself to just immerse yourself in the nature ! Look around and admire its beauty. And just smile hehe :)

closure.carryForward: Im carrying some positivity! A will to find a moment of peace! And dont think of peace as something scarce.
closure.release: I am leaving behind some negative thoughts I had earlier this morning. The feeling of dreading hanging out with my family. Instead, I will take it upon myself to ensure I organise some quality time with them.
closure.finalNote: You have experienced a lot of grief and trauma. The past couple of years you have kept reminding yourself that you are in search of peace.

closure.release: Hopefully the art of lying to myself lol
closure.finalNote: Its okay to feel how you feel. Its okay to do what youre doing. Its okay to just be yourself. Unapologetically yourself. Just enjoy your own journey!

closure.carryForward: The burden of continuing to figure out life. Figure out whats meant for me.
closure.release: Some negative thoughts, and lack of self acceptance.
closure.finalNote: Prioritise yourself. Your healing. Your mental health. Remember it all needs to start with you !

tomorrowPlan.note: Just try your best to relax, unwind. Remove the feelings of guilt and just let yourself enjoy the moment ! You have some beautiful people in your life. Let yourself heal. Its gonna be okay !

closure.carryForward: Confusion haha ! What is the correct path to go down?
closure.release: Feeling of guilt. I am not doing anything wrong. Other people have done whatever they wanted to. Without any consideration for consequences. You were left to deal with that all on your own! Youre allowed to make your own choices. If it hurts others, that so be it!
